questions.question: What does the phrase 'wisdom paves the way' mean?
questions.correct_answer: Wise thinking helps people find the right solution to problems
questions.explanation: The phrase suggests that careful thinking and intelligence can guide people toward better decisions.

questions.question: What is meant by wisdom?
questions.correct_answer: The ability to make good decisions based on knowledge and experience
questions.explanation: Wisdom involves thinking carefully and choosing the best possible action.

questions.question: Why is wisdom important in solving problems?
questions.correct_answer: Because it helps people think calmly and choose effective solutions
questions.explanation: Wise people analyse situations carefully instead of reacting emotionally.

questions.question: What role does patience play in wise decision-making?
questions.correct_answer: Patience allows people to think clearly before acting
questions.explanation: Rushing decisions can cause mistakes, while patience supports better judgment.

questions.question: How can misunderstandings lead to conflicts?
questions.correct_answer: When people misinterpret actions or words, disagreements may occur
questions.explanation: Misunderstandings often create unnecessary problems that can be solved through communication.

questions.question: What quality helps people resolve conflicts peacefully?
questions.explanation: Wisdom encourages calm thinking, understanding, and fair solutions.

questions.question: Why should people think before making decisions?
questions.correct_answer: To avoid mistakes and make better choices
questions.explanation: Careful thinking helps individuals understand consequences before acting.

questions.question: What lesson does the story teach about intelligence and anger?
questions.correct_answer: Wisdom and intelligence are more effective than anger
questions.explanation: Calm thinking leads to better outcomes than reacting emotionally.

questions.question: How can wisdom help maintain harmony?
questions.correct_answer: By helping people understand situations and act fairly
questions.explanation: Wise decisions prevent conflicts and encourage cooperation.

questions.question: What is the main message of the lesson?
questions.correct_answer: Wisdom guides people toward solving problems and making good decisions
questions.explanation: The story highlights the value of thoughtful thinking and understanding.

notes.title: Wisdom
notes.content: Wisdom is the ability to use knowledge and experience to make good decisions.

notes.title: Importance of Careful Thinking
notes.content: Thinking carefully before acting helps people avoid mistakes and make better choices.

notes.title: Conflict Resolution
notes.content: Conflicts can be resolved through communication, patience, and wise decision-making.

notes.title: Value of Patience
notes.content: Patience allows individuals to analyse situations calmly before reacting.

notes.title: Lesson of the Story
notes.content: Wisdom and intelligence help people solve problems peacefully and maintain harmony.

facts.fact: Wisdom involves thoughtful decision-making and understanding consequences.
Careful thinking often prevents conflicts and misunderstandings.
Patience and understanding are important qualities of wise individuals.
Wise decisions help maintain harmony and cooperation in society.
